footer.description: Premium whiskies curated from around the world.

links.label: Shipping Policy
links.content:
Shipping & Delivery

Delivery Scope & Fees

  • International Shipping: We specialize in international orders and do not offer delivery within Taiwan.

  • Calculated Shipping: Final shipping costs and estimated delivery times are based on your location and total weight, which will be displayed during checkout.

  • Special Quotes: If your country is not listed at checkout, please contact us at wishliquor@outlook.com for a custom shipping quote.

Dispatch & Tracking

  • Processing Time: Standard items are generally dispatched within 1–3 business days. Orders sourced from partner suppliers may require additional processing time.

  • Specialty Items: For rare or "hard-to-find" bottles, dispatch times vary. We will keep you updated regarding the status of such orders.

  • Pre-Orders: For limited releases or pre-sale items, please refer to the estimated dispatch dates provided on the specific product page.

  • Order Tracking: Once your order is shipped, you will receive an email notification containing your tracking number.

Customs & Taxes (DAP)

  • Shipping Terms: All orders are shipped under DAP (Delivered At Place) terms. Wish Liquor is responsible for delivering the goods to your specified address; however, the buyer is responsible for all import clearance, local taxes, and customs duties incurred in the destination country.

Important Reminders

  • Signature Required: To ensure secure delivery, all packages must be signed for by an adult.

  • Legal Age Compliance: Both the sender and the recipient must meet the legal drinking age required by their respective local jurisdictions.

  • Separate Shipments: If an order contains products from different retailers, items may be shipped separately and may incur individual shipping charges.

FAQs

  • How do I track my progress? Please check your email for the tracking number or log in to your account on our website to view your order status.

Contact Us: For any inquiries, please reach out to us at wishliquor@outlook.com We are happy to assist you.

links.label: Privacy Policy
links.content:
Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 2025

Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you make a purchase, create an account, or contact us for support. This includes: name, email address, shipping address, billing address, and payment information.

How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to process transactions, send you order confirmations, and communicate with you about your orders. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

Data Security

We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. All payment transactions are processed through secure payment gateways.

Contact Us
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at wishliquor@outlook.com

links.label: Terms and Conditions
links.content:
Terms and Conditions

Last updated: January 2025

General

By accessing and using wishliquor.co, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.

Products & Pricing

All products are subject to availability. Prices are listed in USD and are subject to change without notice. We make every effort to ensure accurate product descriptions and pricing.

Age Restriction

You must be of legal drinking age in your country of residence to purchase alcohol from this site. By placing an order, you confirm that you are of legal drinking age.

International Orders

We only accept international orders. We do not deliver within Taiwan. All orders are shipped under DAP (Delivered At Place) terms.

Limitation of Liability

Wish Liquor shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of this website or our products.

Contact Us
For any questions about these Terms, please contact us at wishliquor@outlook.com

links.label: About Us
links.content:
About Wish Liquor

Welcome to wishliquor.co - your destination for premium whiskies curated from around the world.

We source and deliver exceptional spirits from Scotland, Japan, Taiwan, and beyond. Our mission is to bring rare and limited-edition bottlings to enthusiasts worldwide.

Founded by whisky lovers, for whisky lovers. We work directly with distilleries and authorized retailers to ensure authenticity and quality.

Contact Us
Email: wishliquor@outlook.com
UBN: 83120142

links.label: Contact Us
links.content:
Contact Us

We'd love to hear from you!

For inquiries about orders, products, or partnerships, please contact us:

Email: wishliquor@outlook.com

We typically respond within 1-2 business days.

For bulk orders or corporate inquiries, please include details about your requirements and we'll get back to you with a tailored quote.

links.label: Wish for It
links.content:
Wish for It

Can't find what you're looking for? Tell us what you wish for!

We continuously source rare and limited-edition bottlings from around the world. If there's a specific whisky you're after, let us know and we'll do our best to make your wish come true.

Contact us at: wishliquor@outlook.com

links.label: Corporate & Bulk
links.content:
Corporate & Bulk Orders

We offer special pricing for corporate events, gifting programs, and bulk purchases.

Benefits include:
- Volume discounts
- Custom packaging options
- Dedicated account manager
- Flexible payment terms for qualified buyers

Contact us at wishliquor@outlook.com with your requirements for a tailored quote.
